description: Product Description ABOUT PRODUCT These holders look fantastic when used in your home as a centerpiece or at a romantic candlelit dinner. Also suitable for weddings, baby showers, birthday parties, meditating, aromatherapy, salons, spas, dining rooms, restaurants and churches. These clear candle holders are also suitable for home decor, they can shine in your bedroom, dining room, bathroom, and even on the wall. We wish to light up every corner of your home. 24 CLEAR GLASS TEALIGHT CANDLE HOLDERS Made of clear glass material ZUVO clear glass tea light candle holders are both functional, decorative and also an easy way to spruce up your space. The candleholders in this set are made of clear sturdy glass. These clear tealight candle holders are good table centerpiece accessories to add a glam touch to your special moments. The candle glow coming through clear glass will make people feel warm, romantic, comforted. Transparent Durable quality Reusable Product dimensions: 5l x 5w x 2.5h cm Comes with a set of 24 pieces SET OF 24 CANDLE HOLDERS A set of 24 clear tealight candle holders are good table centerpiece accessories to add a glam touch to your special moments. MADE OF CLEAR STURDY GLASS Clear candle holders have a great light transmittance, which can bring romance and warmth for any occasion.
